message:
feat(connectors): add Beads↔Linear sync planning types and apply formatting

Linear connector types.rs:
- Add comprehensive Beads↔Linear bidirectional sync planning types
  including SyncConflictPolicy (PreferFreshest/PreferBead/PreferLinear/
  Manual), SyncField enum, SyncOperationKind, FieldDiff, SyncPlanEntry,
  and SyncPlan for deterministic conflict resolution
- Implement SyncPlan::plan_sync() that performs field-level diffing
  between bead and Linear issue snapshots, applying conflict policy to
  produce a deterministic sync plan with per-field audit trails
- Add extensive tests: round-trip serde for all sync types, policy
  behavior verification, field-level diff detection, plan generation
  for identical/diverged/missing items, ordering stability
- Apply rustfmt to existing webhook test assertions

Linear connector.rs:
- Reformat error closure in webhook payload deserialization to satisfy
  rustfmt (closure body with struct literal)

GitHub connector.rs:
- Same rustfmt fix for webhook payload error closure

GitHub types.rs:
- Reformat long assert_eq! and tuple expressions for rustfmt compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
